summary: Static-only verification of default-profile-on-registration fix (no dotnet SDK in sandbox). All static assertions from the review request PASSED.

static_verification.profile_add_position: PASS - _db.Profiles.Add is at AccountController.cs line 290, AFTER _db.Users.Add (line 280) and BEFORE the first SaveChangesAsync (line 338). Both inserts land in the same transaction.
static_verification.profile_fields: PASS - New Profile initialized with UserEmail=user.Email, Name=Loc.T('DefaultProfileNameSelf'), Relationship='self', IsDefault=true, CreatedAt=DateTime.UtcNow. Matches Profile.cs model (UserEmail line 20, Relationship line 29, CreatedAt line 52, IsDefault line 55).
static_verification.fk_ordering: PASS - Profile.UserEmail is FK -> Users.Email; EF Core will INSERT User first then Profile automatically. No manual ordering needed.
static_verification.i18n_key_all_7_languages: PASS - DefaultProfileNameSelf found in exactly 7 language blocks in Loc.cs at lines 1089(en=Me), 2175(ro=Eu), 3240(fr=Moi), 4305(es=Yo), 5370(de=Ich), 6386(it=Io), 7400(pt=Eu).
static_verification.brace_balance: PASS - AccountController.cs braces balanced (0 delta); Loc.cs braces balanced (0 delta).
static_verification.imports: PASS - AccountController.cs top has 'using MedicalApp.Models;' (line 2) and 'using MedicalApp.Services;' (line 3) - both required for Profile class and Loc helper.
static_verification.no_regressions: PASS - StartupSeed.EnsureDefaultProfilesAsync untouched (still handles legacy users at boot). No other user-creation paths modified.
static_verification.interpretation_controller: PASS - InterpretationController.Index unchanged; existing IsDefault=true selection logic will now pick up the new profile.

critical_code_review_comments: Fix is minimal, correctly scoped, and placed in the right position (inside the transaction with the User insert). No issues found.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sandbox has NO dotnet SDK - only static verification is possible. Runtime testing must be performed by the user on Windows/VS2026. Bug fix affects only NEW B2C registrations completing VerifyEmail after app boot.
